_comment: Greenspace 7, Under-Performing — Yield Report RZ-7 stream prop (renamed paper, the house npc_gift ship shape; written_book pages need double quotes, and the report TEXT is delivered by the analyst eavesdrop chain). Given by overheard_three on villain_yield_analyst, or by the withdrawn tray button after the analyst is beaten. Feeds the Lucian receiving entry (gate yield_report_taken -> latch scrub_report_filed).

lore.text: Finding: the resident Venusaur produces no auditable yield
